races.name: Goblin
races.shortDescription: The mischievous chaos causers of Mundain.
races.description:
It is said that the Gods created the goblins to give the unemployed something to do. In truth, the Gods lost all control of the goblins almost immediately. Unlike the other Awakened races, goblins are not born sentient, instead gaining self actualisation through a cocktail of hallucinogenic cave mushrooms. These somewhat sensible goblinoids call themselves Gobbos, often attaching themselves to human nomad caravans to roam the world, stockpiling mushrooms for future generations.
The solitary Gobbo city of Pyub is built around a gigantic tree that leaks hundreds of gallons of sap a day, which the Gobbos refine into a delicious, sweet alcohol that serves as their sole trade good throughout the world. It is theorised that the proliferation of Gobbo booze is a key factor in the impractical armour and casual nudity of the modern world. It's not, but people like a blame figure.
Feral goblins are a common nuisance for travellers and pilgrims, raiding caravans for food, slaves and weaponry. Seasoned wanderers will purchase and carry supplies of cave mushrooms to force enlightenment on raiding goblins.
Goblins are by far the most varied in size and shape of all the humanoid races, ranging in height of two and a half to five feet, with skin colours from vibrant green to dark grey, and ears that range from no larger than an elf's to as long as their torso. In fact, it seems the only thing that unifies the goblin race is their love of mischief and chaos.
traits: I'm really short. Even for a Gobbo.
My family have trailed the same human caravan for generations.
It takes a lot to get me drunk. But I'm a fun drunk.
My ears are gigantic and floppy. It makes me very attractive among my people.
A guy once kicked me (d20 x 5) feet across a room.

Half my teeth are missing after a shin biting incident.

I'm constantly saying that their own history, not tailing the humans.
My tits are huge.
No matter how many people are in the bed, I will hog all the blanket.
I have a big ugly scar across the side of my head.
My family settled an oasis in the Red Desert.
I'm an atheist. I know the Novice Gods exist, but I don't believe in them.
My eyes are two different colours.
I call everyone Champ.
I used to raise chickens, until one killed my sister.
I've been drunk for so long I can't remember where I live.
I can write my name. It's a big deal among Gobbo culture.
I prefer elf pussy.

races.name: Dragonkin

subraces.name: Dracolithian
subraces.description: 6 to 7 feet tall, muscular, big-chinned, dumb as a brick. Often hired as labourers and mercenaries.

subraces.name: Quetzian
subraces.description: 4 to 5 feet tall, squishy, adorable, feeble but very smart. Make for excellent scholars, architects and wizards.

subraces.name: Wyvernian
subraces.description: 5 to 6 feet tall, lithe, big-eyed, gorgeous and long tendriled. Great dancers, sex workers and negotiators.

subraces.name: Koboldian
subraces.description: 3 to 4 feet tall, tiny, cute but the bottom rung of Dragonkin society. Often resort to thievery or banditry in groups.

traits: One of my brain tendrils was cut off and I forgot where I live.

races.name: Orc
traits: I once punched a giant clear off the side of a mountain.
